channel.title: Projects on Ali Chaghani
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Ali Chaghani

item.title: Project 2: Modeling, Testing, and Predicting
item.description: Modeling Guidelines and Rubric 0. (5 pts) Introduce your dataset and each of your variables (or just your main variables if you have lots) in a paragraph. What are they measuring? How many observations? library(tidyverse) library(AER) phd <- data("PhDPublications") summary(PhDPublications) ## articles gender married kids prestige mentor ## Min. : 0.000 male :494 no :309 Min. :0.0000 Min. :0.755 Min. : 0.000 ## 1st Qu.: 0.000 female:421 yes:606 1st Qu.

item.title: R Notebook
item.description: ## paste this chunk into the ```{r setup} chunk at the top of your project 1 .Rmd file knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = TRUE, fig.align = "center", warning = F, message = F, tidy=TRUE, tidy.opts=list(width.cutoff=60), R.options=list(max.print=100)) Project one SDS 348 Ali Chaghani I decided on two data sets from carData and fivethirtyeight to see if states with a higher percentage of high school graduates who took a SAT have higher insurance premiums.
